caption: A man is featured in a podcast studio setting, appearing in different outfits across the frames. In the first scene, he wears a white shirt with a red bow tie, suspenders, and a tall, grey, stylized wig, speaking into a microphone while wearing headphones. Subsequent frames show him in a different outfit: a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT M" printed on it, a black baseball cap with a gold emblem, and gold jewelry, including a watch and necklace. He is seen adjusting his headphones and cap while positioned in front of a microphone. The background includes a white wall with "BOSS TALK 101" and "HUSTLE" text, alongside stars. On-screen logos include "BOSS TALK 101" and "BOSS TALK PODCAST." The scene transitions from the man in the white shirt to the man in the black t-shirt, who is seen adjusting his gear.
